allowed: OMNI may influence targeting, allocation, interestingness, and probe prioritization.
disallowed: OMNI may not bypass risk gates, evidence gates, baseline comparisons, persistence tests, council stop authority, or dossier packaging.
slogan: Search control is not outcome authority.

checks.protectedBy: Prohibited-domain and unsafe-deployment signals can stop or downgrade outcomes.
Confidence cannot inflate without evidence execution; simulated evidence stays capped.
Every serious advantage claim is comparative against incumbent, neighbor, or null baseline.
High novelty receives more skepticism and stress testing before promotion.
Validator/Architect Council can stop, bound, or request a dossier before release.
